SELECT
    replaceAll(toString(events.properties), %(hogql_val_0)s, %(hogql_val_1)s) AS url,
    count() AS views,
    uniqExact(events.distinct_id) AS uniq
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(equals(events.team_id, 319864), equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_2)s), greater(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_3)s), minus(now64(6, %(hogql_val_4)s), toIntervalHour(6))))
GROUP BY
    url
ORDER BY
    views DESC
LIMIT 15 SETTINGS readonly=2, max_execution_time=10, max_threads=60, allow_experimental_object_type=1, max_ast_elements=4000000, max_expanded_ast_elements=4000000, max_bytes_before_external_group_by=0, enable_analyzer=1, transform_null_in=1, optimize_min_equality_disjunction_chain_length=4294967295, allow_experimental_join_condition=1, use_hive_partitioning=0

SELECT
    replaceAll(toString(properties), 'https://vaos.sh', '') AS url,
    count() AS views,
    uniqExact(distinct_id) AS uniq
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(equals(event, '$pageview'), greater(timestamp, minus(now(), toIntervalHour(6))))
GROUP BY
    url
ORDER BY
    views DESC
LIMIT 15
